Container.Name: Feberdin Agent Team Bootstrap
Container.Overview: Installs or updates the Feberdin multi-agent project under one dedicated Unraid appdata root. This template is a bootstrap helper, not the long-running application stack itself. It downloads a bootstrap script with curl from your Git repository, clones or updates the repo, prepares the project folders, and can optionally start docker compose on the Unraid host.
Container.PostArgs: -lc 'apk add --no-cache bash curl git >/dev/null && export PROJECT_ROOT="/project" && curl -fsSL "$BOOTSTRAP_SCRIPT_URL" | bash'
Container.Requires: Docker enabled in Unraid. Mount /var/run/docker.sock only if AUTO_START_STACK=true.

Config.Name: Project Root
Config.Description: Dedicated host root for repo, data, reports, workspace, and staging-stacks.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Optional. Required only when AUTO_START_STACK=true so the bootstrap can run docker compose on the Unraid host.

Config.Name: Bootstrap Script URL
Config.Description: Raw URL to scripts/unraid/install-from-git.sh in your Git repository. Example: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OWNER/REPO/main/scripts/unraid/install-from-git.sh

Config.Name: Repository URL
Config.Description: Git clone URL of the project repository to install. Example: https://github.com/OWNER/REPO.git

Config.Name: Repository Ref
Config.Description: Git branch or tag to install or update.

Config.Name: Auto Start Stack
Config.Description: Set to true only if the bootstrap container is allowed to start docker compose on the Unraid host.
